case_title: WAYNE H. SMITH VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SMITH, WAYNE H. AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. POFF, SUZANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ANTONIO GONZALES OGAS - CURRY SENIOR CENTER 315 TURK ST.,SAN FRANCISCO,CA. 94102 (415)885-2274.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, WAYNE H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. POFF, SUZANNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
